title: IREN Q3 FY2026 slides: 5GW AI expansion despite earnings miss
text:
IREN Ltd announced its third-quarter fiscal 2026 results, revealing a strategic transformation from cryptocurrency mining toward AI data center infrastructure. Despite missing earnings expectations, the company outlined an ambitious expansion roadmap.

Financial Performance: The company reported revenue of $144.8 million, falling significantly short of the $219.87 million analyst forecast. Earnings per share reached -$0.30 versus the projected -$0.2161. The net loss widened to $247.8 million from the prior quarter's $155.4 million loss.

However, the underlying business showed promise. Adjusted EBITDA of $59.5 million with a 41% margin demonstrated operational profitability despite non-cash charges tied to mining equipment decommissioning totaling $140.4 million.

Strategic Developments: The centerpiece was a partnership with NVIDIA valued at $3.4 billion over five years for AI cloud services. The tech giant received a warrant to purchase up to 30 million IREN shares at $70 each.

IREN projects scaling to 5 gigawatts of data center capacity by 2028, with $3.1 billion in contracted annual recurring revenue already secured.
